title: The Hulk
author: Scott Adams
objective: As Bruce Banner/Hulk, collect all Gem Eggs hidden in Dr. Strange's domain.
key_mechanics: You alternate between Bruce Banner (weak, smart) and the Hulk (strong, limited) based on anger/calm
BITE LIP, BITE TONGUE, or ROCK the chair triggers anger and Hulk transformation
SLEEP or CALM DOWN reverts to Bruce Banner from Hulk form
GO DOME from tunnels sets transformation flags (flags 3+4) - you change form when exiting
As Hulk: can break things, HIT enemies, DIG, SCRATCH walls. As Banner: can use items, think clearly
DIG in fields creates holes leading underground - items are auto-dropped when digging
WAVE FAN AT BEES to blow away killer bees (need metal hand fan from room 2)
SCRATCH WALL with Hulk rage in the underground room opens a hidden passage
LOOK BASE in dome 14 reveals hidden items (drops held item)
The fuzzy area (room 16) is the treasure room - DROP all 17 gems here
Warp zones (rooms 17, 18) transport you automatically - avoid compass directions from fields
The natter energy egg from room 15 is a key item - not just a treasure
ULTRON in the cavern must be defeated with Hulk strength (HIT ULTRON)

walkthrough.result: Pain triggers anger - beginning Hulk transformation
Fall and hit head, completing the anger transformation to Hulk
Hulk grabs the first gem in the dome
Get the metal hand fan (needed for bees)
Lift the iron ring in the floor
Exit to the field (transforms back to Banner)
Get the gem in the field
Dig a hole (drops items, creates passage to room 9)
Find hidden item at dome base (drops held item)
Get gem in field with tiny holes
Dig hole (drops items, creates passage to room 10)
Blow away the killer bees with the metal fan
Get gem in field by mesh dome
As Hulk, scratch through the wall to escape
Drop all collected gems in the treasure room

common_mistakes: BITE TONGUE as the first action - it triggers anger but also causes death (use ROCK or BITE LIP instead)
Going N/S/E/W from field areas - all four directions warp you to random locations
Entering the bee dome (room 13) without the metal hand fan - killer bees attack
Trying to SCRATCH WALL as Banner instead of Hulk - need rage/Hulk form
Not picking up the metal hand fan from room 2 before encountering bees
Forgetting that DIG drops your carried items - plan accordingly
Not realizing GO DOME triggers transformation flags - you change form going through tunnels
Trying to fight ULTRON as Banner instead of Hulk - need Hulk strength
Missing the LOOK BASE hidden item in dome (room 14) - it drops your held item as a side effect
Going to the Chief Examiner room (19) and doing anything that alerts him - banished to room 16
Not understanding the Banner/Hulk duality - some puzzles need smarts (Banner), others need strength (Hulk)
Forgetting the natter energy egg in room 15 - it's a key item, not just scenery
